summary: Conservative plan for live PR inventory shard: no shared canonical, no merge/fix/close actions. All five open PRs remain non-mutating classifications because the job only allows safe close/comment/label actions and the hydrated evidence does not make any PR boringly duplicate, superseded, abandoned, or low-signal.

actions.reason: Keep as an independent open PR for maintainer review; no close-style action is justified in this inventory shard.
Keep as an independent open PR with proof and current-base blockers; failing checks block merge/fixed-by-candidate closeout but not conservative classification.
Keep related to the linked open issue #76492; draft/proof gaps are not grounds for closure in plan mode.
Keep related to the linked open Feishu issue; it is useful focused work and not closable as duplicate/superseded/low-signal.
Keep related to the already-closed source issue for context; the PR remains a useful focused contribution awaiting maintainer review, not an inventory-close candidate.
